description: Reference table mapping authority-specific legal event codes to standardized descriptions and categories.

columns.name: event_auth
columns.description: Patent authority that uses this event code.

columns.name: event_code
columns.description: Authority-specific code for the legal event.

columns.name: event_descr
columns.description: Standardized English description of the legal event.

columns.name: event_descr_orig
columns.description: Original description of the legal event in the authority's language.

columns.name: event_category_code
columns.description: Standardized category code grouping similar types of legal events.

columns.name: event_category_title
columns.description: Title describing the standardized event category.
